input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy an inline Snort IPS device between the internal network and the perimeter to automatically detect and block ICMP flood attacks.", "Configure the perimeter firewall (FortiGate) with a DoS policy to limit ICMP packets per second from each internal host.", "Implement QoS policing on the edge router to rate-limit ICMP traffic to a reasonable bandwidth.", "Enable ICMP rate limiting on the switch using storm control or ACLs to restrict excessive ICMP traffic."], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy an inline Snort IPS device between the internal network and the perimeter to automatically detect and block ICMP flood attacks.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

response.content: {"suggestions": ["Deploy an inline Snort IPS device between the internal network and the perimeter to automatically detect and block ICMP flood attacks.", "Configure the perimeter firewall (FortiGate) with a DoS policy to limit ICMP packets per second from each internal host.", "Implement QoS policing on the edge router to rate-limit ICMP traffic to a reasonable bandwidth.", "Enable ICMP rate limiting on the switch using storm control or ACLs to restrict excessive ICMP traffic."], "chosen_mitigation": "Deploy an inline Snort IPS device between the internal network and the perimeter to automatically detect and block ICMP flood attacks.", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 1, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}
